mappings.actualHistoricalAction: Proceed with a $27.7 billion mixed cash-and-stock acquisition funded partly with new debt.
Terminate the acquisition after concluding there was no clear path to required regulatory approvals.
Increase technical-infrastructure capital expenditure to secure compute capacity across AI, Cloud, and services.
Raise the capital-expenditure range and signal further increases to accelerate the AI roadmap.
Prioritize paid sharing and defer broad price increases until additional service value was established.
Increase Premium prices across multiple markets with advance customer notice.
Launch a $10 billion cost plan and reduce projected gross capital expenditure by more than 20 percent.
Reduce total headcount materially while resuming focused hiring and increasing infrastructure investment.
Authorize an additional $110 billion repurchase capacity and raise the quarterly dividend.
Authorize the company's first share-repurchase program while retaining deployment discretion.
